mapper.select: SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_inout t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.inout_date DESC, t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_inout WHERE is_deleted = 0
SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_inout t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND t.inout_type = #{inoutType} ORDER BY t.inout_date DESC, t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_inout WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND inout_type = #{inoutType}

SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_inout t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 AND (t.item_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR t.manager LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR t.location LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%') ORDER BY t.inout_date DESC, t.id DESC OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{limit} ROWS ONLY
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_ppe_inout WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND (item_name LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR manager LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%' OR location LIKE '%' + #{keyword} + '%')
SELECT t.* FROM tb_ppe_inout t WHERE t.id = #{id} AND t.is_deleted = 0
SELECT TOP (#{limit}) t.* FROM tb_ppe_inout t WHERE t.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY t.inout_date DESC, t.id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_ppe_inout ( inout_date, item_id, item_name, inout_type, quantity, location, expiry_date, manager, note, created_by, modified_by, created_at, modified_at, is_deleted ) VALUES ( #{inoutDate}, #{itemId}, #{itemName}, #{inoutType}, #{quantity}, #{location}, #{expiryDate}, #{manager}, #{note}, #{createdBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, SYSDATETIME(), SYSDATETIME(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_ppe_inout SET inout_date = #{inoutDate}, item_id = #{itemId}, item_name = #{itemName}, inout_type = #{inoutType}, quantity = #{quantity}, location = #{location}, expiry_date = #{expiryDate}, manager = #{manager}, note = #{note}, modified_by = #{modifiedBy,typeHandler=com.smartehs.config.typehandler.PersonRefTypeHandler}, modified_at = SYSDATETIME() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE tb_ppe_inout SET is_deleted = 1, modified_at = SYSDATETIME() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT ISNULL(SUM(quantity), 0) FROM tb_ppe_inout WHERE is_deleted = 0 AND inout_type = #{inoutType} AND YEAR(inout_date) = YEAR(GETDATE()) AND MONTH(inout_date) = MONTH(GETDATE())
